name: Birthday Celebrations
shortDescription: Custom menus, private dining room, and a space that makes the occasion feel like one.
heroImageAlt: Private dining room set up for a birthday celebration at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego
seoTitle: Birthday Party Venue in Little Italy San Diego | Coco Maya
seoDescription: Celebrate a birthday at Coco Maya's private dining room or elevated patio in Little Italy, San Diego. Custom menus and drink packages for any size group.
intro: From an intimate dinner for ten to a full patio takeover, our private dining room and elevated patio flex to match the celebration you have in mind.
We handle custom menus, drink packages, and the small details, birthday cake included, so you can actually be at your own party instead of running it.
Milestone birthdays tend to book the full patio or a full buyout, while smaller, more intimate celebrations usually land in the private dining room, warmer, quieter, and still connected to the bar.

highlights.label: Private Dining Room
highlights.detail: An intimate, semi-enclosed space for smaller celebrations, connected to the main bar without being exposed to it.

highlights.label: Full Patio Buyout
highlights.detail: For milestone birthdays, take over the entire elevated patio for the night.

highlights.label: Custom Menus & Drink Packages
highlights.detail: Build a plated, family-style, or passed-apps menu around your group's taste and budget.

highlights.label: Cake Service
highlights.detail: Bring your own cake, we'll handle storage, plating, and timing so it lands at the right moment.

highlights.label: Flexible Timing
highlights.detail: Lunch, dinner, or late-night, we can build around whichever fits your celebration.

atmosphereImageAlt: Coco Maya bar opening onto the patio for a birthday celebration
atmosphereLine: Indoors or out, the party moves with you, bar to patio, without missing a beat.

faqs.question: How far in advance should we book a birthday party?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking 3 to 4 weeks out for weekend dates, though we can often accommodate shorter notice for smaller groups on weekdays.

faqs.question: Can you accommodate a birthday cake?
faqs.answer: Yes, you're welcome to bring in a cake, and our team can coordinate storage and service timing for you.

faqs.question: Is there a minimum spend for private dining room bookings?
faqs.answer: Minimum spends vary by day of week and time slot. Email us with your date and headcount and we'll send exact numbers with your proposal.

faqs.question: Can we bring in outside decor or a party planner?
faqs.answer: Yes, we regularly work alongside outside decorators and planners. Loop them into your inquiry so we can coordinate setup timing together.

faqs.question: Do you offer kid-friendly options for family birthday parties?
faqs.answer: Yes, our kitchen can build a family-friendly menu alongside the regular offering for celebrations with guests of all ages.
